description_long: This is a classic adjustable pipe wrench featuring a robust metal head and a wooden handle. The head is composed of a dark, heavy metal with a movable lower jaw, which can be adjusted using a knurled screw mechanism. The jaws are thick and slightly curved, designed to grip round objects such as pipes securely. The handle is cylindrical, made of wood, and tapers slightly towards the end, providing a comfortable grip. The metal parts show a matte finish with some minor surface irregularities, while the wood has a natural grain pattern. There are no visible brand markings or logos on the tool.
description: A sturdy adjustable pipe wrench with a dark metal head and a smooth wooden handle, featuring a movable jaw and knurled adjustment screw.
description_view_0: Front view showing the curved jaws and adjustment mechanism, with the handle receding backward.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the full length of the wrench, the wooden handle, and the adjustment screw.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the rounded end of the wooden handle and the back of the wrench head.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile displaying the metal head, adjustment screw, and the handle's wood grain.
